question: Which month of 2025 had the highest completed-order revenue? Show the month and the revenue.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1
